Simulacao da Etapa 2 - Tarefa 2 (Caminho de dados, instrucoes de 21 bits)
Formato da instrucao: Controle da ULA (8) | Barramento C (9) | Barramento B (4)

Estado Inicial dos Registradores:
	h   = 00000000000000000000000000000000
	opc = 00000000000000000000000000000000
	tos = 00000000000000000000000000000111
	cpp = 00000000000000000000000000000011
	lv  = 00000000000000000000000000000101
	sp  = 00000000000000000000000000000100
	mbr = 00000110
	pc  = 00000000000000000000000000000001
	mdr = 00000000000000000000000000001001
	mar = 00000000000000000000000000000000

Instrucao 1
	ir = 00110100 000011000 0010
	barramento B = mbr
	barramento C = sp, lv
	Registradores antes da instrucao:
		h   = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		opc = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		tos = 00000000000000000000000000000111
		cpp = 00000000000000000000000000000011
		lv  = 00000000000000000000000000000101
		sp  = 00000000000000000000000000000100
		mbr = 00000110
		pc  = 00000000000000000000000000000001
		mdr = 00000000000000000000000000001001
		mar = 00000000000000000000000000000000
	Registradores apos a instrucao:
		h   = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		opc = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		tos = 00000000000000000000000000000111
		cpp = 00000000000000000000000000000011
		lv  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		sp  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		mbr = 00000110
		pc  = 00000000000000000000000000000001
		mdr = 00000000000000000000000000001001
		mar = 00000000000000000000000000000000

Instrucao 2
	ir = 00110100 000001000 0011
	barramento B = mbru
	barramento C = sp
	Registradores antes da instrucao:
		h   = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		opc = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		tos = 00000000000000000000000000000111
		cpp = 00000000000000000000000000000011
		lv  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		sp  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		mbr = 00000110
		pc  = 00000000000000000000000000000001
		mdr = 00000000000000000000000000001001
		mar = 00000000000000000000000000000000
	Registradores apos a instrucao:
		h   = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		opc = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		tos = 00000000000000000000000000000111
		cpp = 00000000000000000000000000000011
		lv  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		sp  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		mbr = 00000110
		pc  = 00000000000000000000000000000001
		mdr = 00000000000000000000000000001001
		mar = 00000000000000000000000000000000

Instrucao 3
	ir = 00111101 100000000 0111
	barramento B = tos
	barramento C = h
	Registradores antes da instrucao:
		h   = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		opc = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		tos = 00000000000000000000000000000111
		cpp = 00000000000000000000000000000011
		lv  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		sp  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		mbr = 00000110
		pc  = 00000000000000000000000000000001
		mdr = 00000000000000000000000000001001
		mar = 00000000000000000000000000000000
	Registradores apos a instrucao:
		h   = 00000000000000000000000000001000
		opc = 00000000000000000000000000000000
		tos = 00000000000000000000000000000111
		cpp = 00000000000000000000000000000011
		lv  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		sp  = 00000000000000000000000000000110
		mbr = 00000110
		pc  = 00000000000000000000000000000001
		mdr = 00000000000000000000000000001001
		mar = 00000000000000000000000000000000

Fim da simulacao da Etapa 2 - Tarefa 2.
